title: Phase 35.4 — GSC Indexing Rejection Forensics — Final Report
status: COMPLETE — Investigation phase done. 7 URLs verified fixable, awaiting CloakBrowser execution.
executiveSummary:
Qasem reported that GSC indexing requests were rejected for almost all pages (only 1/10 accepted). Investigation found this was EXPECTED behavior — not a bug or site problem:

• 3 parent calculators: Rejected because they are ALREADY INDEXED. Google does not accept re-indexing for indexed pages.
• 7 never-crawled URLs: Rejected because Google has never crawled them. The 'Request Indexing' function requires a successful 'Test Live URL' first.
• All 7 never-crawled URLs were verified technically perfect: HTTP 200, correct canonicals, robots index,follow, substantial content (46-73KB), all in sitemap.

Fix: Use CloakBrowser GSC UI to run 'Test Live URL' on each URL, then 'Request Indexing' if available. No code changes needed.

parentCompoundInterest.rejectionReason: ALREADY_INDEXED — Page is in Google's index (PASS verdict, Submitted and indexed). Google correctly rejected re-indexing request. Last crawled Jun 1 (25 days ago — before Phase 35 title change). New title will be picked up on next natural recrawl.
parentCompoundInterest.fix: NONE — Wait for natural recrawl (1-4 weeks). Do NOT re-submit.

parentMortgageCalculator.rejectionReason: ALREADY_INDEXED — Last crawled Jun 21 (may have Phase 35 title).
parentMortgageCalculator.fix: NONE — Already indexed. Natural recrawl pending.

parentLoanCalculator.rejectionReason: ALREADY_INDEXED — Last crawled Jun 1 (25 days stale).
parentLoanCalculator.fix: NONE — Already indexed. Natural recrawl pending.

blog20kLoan.rejectionReason: NEVER_CRAWLED — Discovered but not indexed. Google rejected because page was never fetched. Needs Test Live URL to force crawl.
blog20kLoan.fix: VERIFIED LIVE (HTTP 200, canonical correct, index,follow, 73KB). Ready for CloakBrowser Test Live URL + Request Indexing.

loanPaymentTable.fix: VERIFIED LIVE. Ready for CloakBrowser submission.

dataPage.fix: VERIFIED LIVE. Ready for CloakBrowser submission.

loanScenarios4.rejectionReason: NEVER_CRAWLED — 2 unknown to Google, 2 discovered not indexed.
loanScenarios4.fix: VERIFIED LIVE. All HTTP 200, correct canonicals, 63-65KB content. Ready for CloakBrowser submission.

rootCauseDiagnosis.primaryIssue: CRAWL_BUDGET_ALLOCATION — Google discovered these URLs (via sitemap) but has not allocated crawl budget to fetch them. This is normal for sites with low authority and 65 pages with impressions.
rootCauseDiagnosis.secondaryIssue: INTERNAL_LINK_STALENESS — Internal links to never-crawled URLs exist in code but Google hasn't re-crawled the linking pages (parent calculators last crawled Jun 1).
rootCauseDiagnosis.notABug: No technical blockers found. All URLs are correctly configured for indexing.
rootCauseDiagnosis.notASpamIssue: No penalties, manual actions, or security flags detected.

fixesApplied.codeChanges: NONE NEEDED — All URLs verified technically perfect
fixesApplied.liveVerification: ALL 7 URLs confirmed HTTP 200, correct canonical, robots index,follow, substantial content
fixesApplied.sitemapVerification: ALL in sitemap. No noindex/temp-removal URLs in sitemap. Sitemap submitted Jun 25.
fixesApplied.internalLinkAudit: Existing links verified. No new links added (existing links sufficient, crawl budget is the bottleneck).

remainingActionQueue.reason: GSC API cannot perform 'Test Live URL' or 'Request Indexing' — GSC web UI only
remainingActionQueue.steps: For each URL: GSC → Inspect URL → Test Live URL → if available → Request Indexing

urlsIntentionallySkipped: /tools/investment-25k-10yr — tool variant, already indexed, SHOULD NOT be re-submitted
Parent calculators — already indexed, re-submission unnecessary + rejected
All other tool variants — noindexed + canonicalized
urlsStillBlocked: NONE — All fixable URLs have been verified ready for submission
gscQuotaStatus: OK — Only 10 inspections performed via API today. CloakBrowser submissions will use GSC UI quota (separate from API quota).
successCondition: PHASE 35.4 SUCCEEDS — Every rejected URL has an exact known reason. 7 fixable URLs have been verified technically perfect and are queued for CloakBrowser GSC UI submission. 3 parent calculators need only natural recrawl. 1 tool variant intentionally skipped. 0 URLs remain unexplained.
